executive_summary: Latest updates from 4 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 4 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Houthis claim joint attacks with Iran, Hezbollah targeting Ben Gurion Airport. Trump warns Iran deadline nearing, says strikes killed leaders. Iran war live: Tehran rejects Trump’s ultimatum; fire at Kuwait oil complex. Kuwait says drone attacks hit oil, government sites. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Houthis claim joint attacks with Iran, Hezbollah targeting Ben Gurion Airport
key_developments.detail: Yemen’s Houthi group said it would carry out attacks on Israel in coordination with Iran and Hezbollah, with its military spokesman Yahya Saree announcing a joint operation targeting Ben Gurion Airport. Saree said a fifth operation involved a ballistic missile and several drones targeting Lod Airpor
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Yemen’s Houthi group said it would carry out attacks on Israel in coordination with Iran and Hezbollah, with its military spokesman Yahya Saree announcing a joint operation targeting Ben Gurion Airport. Saree said a fifth operation involved a ballistic missile and several drones targeting Lod Airpor

key_developments.headline: Trump warns Iran deadline nearing, says strikes killed leaders
key_developments.detail: President Donald Trump said “time is running out” for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz ahead of his 6 April deadline, warning of consequences if Tehran fails to act. key_developments.headline: Kuwait says drone attacks hit oil, government sites
key_developments.detail: A drone attack sparked a fire at the Shuwaikh Oil Sector Complex in Kuwait, with no injuries reported, according to state news agency KUNA. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
